visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with glasses, wearing a blue cap and a white hoodie with a rainbow Apple logo, stands in a brightly lit indoor room. He gestures with both hands as if explaining something. An image of white AirPods Pro earbuds in a charging case is superimposed on the lower-left side of the frame with large white text underneath. (2) The scene cuts to a high-detail close-up of the AirPods Pro charging case mounted on a thin metal stand against a blurred background. The case is white and glossy. A small circular inset in the bottom left shows the man continuing to speak. (3) The man is back in full view, speaking with high energy. Yellow text overlays appear horizontally across the middle of the screen. He moves his hands dynamically to emphasize his points. (4) A close-up shot shows a hand holding a dark-colored smartphone. The screen displays a 'Live Translation' interface with multiple languages. The background is slightly blurred. (5) The man is shown indoors again, gesturing with his fingers spread. He looks directly at the camera with a serious but informative expression. (6) A screen capture of a smartphone's fitness app is shown, displaying metrics like '45 FT', '24'46"', and '105' in large white font. (7) A close-up of the man's ear shows a white AirPod earbud. He is now outdoors in a natural daylight environment with green trees and a clear sky in the background. He turns his head to show the fit of the earbud. (8) The final shot shows the man outdoors, looking slightly upward and then back to the camera. He is smiling slightly, and subtitles continue to scroll at the bottom of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: AirPods Pro 3 有更新了哪些重點? [Variety]: 更新什麼重點? (3) [Slogan]: #1 主動式降噪功能. (4) [Subtitle]: 包含第一個, 主動式的降噪功能, 它比AirPods Pro 2 是它的性能的兩倍. [Variety]: (比上一代更降噪了) 性能2倍. (5) [Slogan]: #2 即時翻譯功能. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且還具備了即時翻譯功能, 但目前還不支援中文. (7) [Subtitle]: 心律的偵測功能, 搭配手機, 你按下去就可以看. [Slogan]: #3 心律偵測功能. (8) [Slogan]: #4 五款耳塞供選擇. (9) [Subtitle]: 另外有五款不同的耳塞呢, 可以配合不同的需要. (10) [Subtitle]: 主動降噪的功能呢, 正常可以使用8小時, 跟上一代比起來呢, 增加了兩個小時. [Variety]: (增加了) 2個小時. (11) [Subtitle]: 如果你是用通透模式的話, 一樣可以用10小時, 支援IP57 抗汗. (12) [Subtitle]: 遇到下雨也完全不用怕.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a light-colored cap, glasses, and a white hoodie with a colorful Apple logo and a yellow lanyard.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scenes are set in a clean, modern indoor environment with white walls and a large circular mirror. Later scenes transition to an outdoor setting with trees and natural light.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks with high clarity and professional energy, delivering technical information in Traditional Chinese. The pitch is moderate but shows dynamic variability, especially on concluding words of sentences. (2) A synthetic 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition in speech focus. The background music is a steady, upbeat electronic track with a consistent 4/4 beat and bright synth pads. (3) The speaker's intensity increases slightly when listing features, followed by a brief 'pop' sound effect as graphics appear on screen. (4) The audio texture remains clean with high signal-to-noise ratio, though a very faint outdoor ambient floor (wind/leaves) becomes audible in the final third of the track, corresponding to a change in vocal acoustics as the recording environment shifts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature 1 -> Feature 2 -> Feature 3 -> Feature 4 -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly showcase and review the key upgraded features of the Apple AirPods Pro 3 for a tech-interested audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is reviewing a specific product (AirPods Pro 3) and highlighting its benefits and features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical short-form tech review video with high information density, using on-screen text and fast cuts to maintain engagement.
